scripts.deploy: npm run build && rsync -av --delete --exclude='.git' dist/ "$DOCKET_DEPLOY_TARGET"/projects/docket/ && (cd "$DOCKET_DEPLOY_TARGET" && git reset HEAD -- . && git add projects/docket && (git diff --cached --quiet || git commit -m 'Deploy docket app') && git push origin master) && git push origin master
scripts.deploy:canary: npm run build:canary && rsync -av --delete --exclude='.git' dist/ "$DOCKET_DEPLOY_TARGET"/projects/docket-canary/ && (cd "$DOCKET_DEPLOY_TARGET" && git reset HEAD -- . && git add projects/docket-canary && (git diff --cached --quiet || git commit -m 'Deploy docket canary') && git push origin master) && git push origin master
scripts.promote:canary: rsync -av --delete --exclude='.git' "$DOCKET_DEPLOY_TARGET"/projects/docket-canary/ "$DOCKET_DEPLOY_TARGET"/projects/docket/ && (cd "$DOCKET_DEPLOY_TARGET" && git reset HEAD -- . && git add projects/docket && (git diff --cached --quiet || git commit -m 'Promote docket canary to release') && git push origin master)
